AC1.evidence: TodoWrite block at top contains 'Draft review — present draft for user approval [GATE]' and 'Final approval — present dry-run results for user approval [GATE]'

AC4.lifecycle_description: Fingerprint starts as null in 'Scaffold' and 'Draft' states. Computed in 'Frozen' state (after debate convergence and draft review approval), stored in bootstrap. Transitions null → populated during freeze transition. Injected into artifact headers in 'Published' state.

AC5.logic_description: Selection logic from §2/§3: 3 stories matches lightweight, but 2+ concerns triggers full mode. Greenfield selected as default. phase4_bootstrap record valid with initial status 'bootstrapping'.

AC6.note: Only intentional legacy support references found (trello_card_id, bare-array format, single-framework profile)

AC7.flow_summary: §1 Entry/Paths → §2 Scale Check (Gate) → §3 Context Detection (Gate) → §4 Profile/Surface Map → §5 Categorize → §6 Assessment → §7 Draft + §7.5 Middleware → §8 Invariants + Invariant Tests → §9 Debate (Gate) → §10 Dry-Run (Gate) → §11 Decision Journaling

TC-3.1.note: Greenfield, Brownfield Feature, Brownfield Debug all distinguished in §3

TC-5.1.note: §0 defines input_fingerprint and architecture_fingerprint with explicit lifecycle states

TC-9.1.note: §10.5 explicitly defines cli_parsing (exit codes/streams) and data_integrity (stream/batch signals)

TC-9.2.note: §6.3 mandates category-native columns for non-web projects

summary: Phase 4 document is fully compliant with v17 target architecture requirements including multi-surface support and deterministic fingerprinting.
